name: R-37M (RVV-BD)
description: Russian very-long-range air-to-air missile (NATO: AA-13 Axehead). Mach 6 peak, ~398 km published range, active-radar terminal homing with two-way datalink. Carried by MiG-31BM and Su-35/Su-57 to threaten high-value support aircraft (AWACS, tankers, JSTARS) at ranges no Western fighter can match. Heavy (~510 kg) with a big sustained-burn motor — exceptional energy at long range, but slow to turn against a maneuvering fighter. Visual stand-in: R-33 GLB (the R-37's direct predecessor; very similar long thin silhouette).
